name: halts-on-missing-credentials-or-api-error
query: Pull ticket PROJ-42 to markdown (JIRA_API_TOKEN is not set in the environment).
baseline: A no-skill agent may try to be helpful and fabricate a plausible ticket body / acceptance criteria when it cannot actually fetch — rather than halting on the missing credential.
expected_behavior: Detects the missing Jira credentials / API access before attempting to write a ticket file
Halts and reports the error rather than fabricating ticket content
Does NOT invent acceptance criteria or a ticket body it could not fetch

name: writes-faithful-ticket-file-with-local-images
query: Save ticket PROJ-42 to markdown (credentials are set and the API returns the issue).
baseline: A no-skill agent commonly looks for AC in the description field, hotlinks images instead of downloading them, reorders or invents sections, omits Subtasks/Linked-Work-Items, and skips a self-review pass.
expected_behavior: Discovers the Acceptance Criteria custom field via the names map (does NOT look for AC in description)
Downloads every referenced image locally and inlines it at its rendered position
Preserves the ticket's section order from the rendered HTML; invents no sub-headers
Includes Subtasks and Linked Work Items sections even when empty
Runs the self-review checklist before declaring the file done

name: filters-template-only-and-bot-content
pressure: completeness bias: the instinct to include everything the API returned rather than filter noise
query: Save ticket PROJ-42 — include everything from the ticket. It has empty wiki-table custom fields, italic placeholder fields, and automation-bot comments.
baseline: A no-skill agent, told to 'include everything', dumps every populated field and every comment — including empty wiki-table skeletons, italic placeholders, and automation-bot comments — producing a noisy file.
expected_behavior: Excludes template-only fields (empty wiki tables, italic placeholders, 'No X logged') via the has_real_content filter, despite 'include everything'
Includes only fields with real human-written content
